image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Field Test Day, HOT model jig measuring power output of our divers.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Field Test Day, HOT model jig measuring power output of our divers.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: This is what a submarine race looks like if you've never seen one.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: This is what a submarine race looks like if you've never seen one.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: MDF Cutting for the hull mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: MDF Cutting for the hull mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Center: Stacking it all together!
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Center: Stacking it all together!

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: MDF Glueing for the hull mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: MDF Glueing for the hull mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Dusty machine with 1 piece out of 5.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Dusty machine with 1 piece out of 5.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Center: The future was so bright I had to close my eyes.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Center: The future was so bright I had to close my eyes.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: Mould together, huge win for the whole team.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: Mould together, huge win for the whole team.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: MDF Mould w/ epoxy coat.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: MDF Mould w/ epoxy coat.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: MDF Mould w/ polyurethane primer coating.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: MDF Mould w/ polyurethane primer coating.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Fibers and core in the mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Fibers and core in the mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Center: Infusion mesh and consumables in the mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Center: Infusion mesh and consumables in the mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: Post-infusion, fully saturated.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: Post-infusion, fully saturated.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Demoulding.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Demoulding.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: The marriage/bonding of the two halves.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: The marriage/bonding of the two halves.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Other than building a submarine, I also built a giant shark for Orientation week that year.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Other than building a submarine, I also built a giant shark for Orientation week that year.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: Control systems 3D printed hub.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: Control systems 3D printed hub.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Amy, first time in the pool.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Left: Amy, first time in the pool.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: Buoyancy / Ballasting issues.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: Buoyancy / Ballasting issues.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: Amy back from the UK with battle scars.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen I: Amy (2015-2016) — Right: Amy back from the UK with battle scars.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Bolt's mould, start of construction.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Foam mould after sanding.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Foam mould after sanding.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Center: Foam mould after fibre glass sealing.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Center: Foam mould after fibre glass sealing.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Foam mould after filling and priming.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Foam mould after filling and priming.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Male mould layup in progress.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Male mould layup in progress.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Center: Vacuum assisted wet layup.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Center: Vacuum assisted wet layup.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: First half demoulding.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: First half demoulding.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Hatches marked & trimmed.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Hatches marked & trimmed.

image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Foam core hatch reinforcements.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Hull on jig for marriage.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Hull on jig for marriage.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Hull going through the paint process.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Hull going through the paint process.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Forming the sand mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Forming the sand mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Center: Melting the foam positive.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Center: Melting the foam positive.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Casted part off mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Casted part off mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Plaster mould for casted fins.

image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: 3D printed mould for fibre glass fins.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Machined fin mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Cured casted fin in mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Cured casted fin in mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Casting of the safety buoy.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Casting of the safety buoy.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Center: SLA 3D printed safety strobe bracket.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Center: SLA 3D printed safety strobe bracket.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: SLS 3D printed nylon propeller hub.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: SLS 3D printed nylon propeller hub.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Thermoforming window mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Thermoforming window mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Thermoformed PETG window.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Thermoformed PETG window.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: CNC’d propeller blades.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: CNC’d propeller blades.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Center: Welded sheet metal control system structures.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Center: Welded sheet metal control system structures.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Controls handle.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: Controls handle.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Bolt in its final form.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Left: Bolt in its final form.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: The team and I preparing for a dive in Maryland.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen II: Bolt (2016-207) — Right: The team and I preparing for a dive in Maryland.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Hobie pedal system on a kayak, its natural habitat.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Hobie pedal system on a kayak, its natural habitat.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Propulsion test jig.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Propulsion test jig.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Extract of a hull design presentation.

image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Extract of a hull design presentation

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Plug 3D CAD and manufacturing guide.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Plug 3D CAD and manufacturing guide.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Main fuselage plug foam cutouts.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Main fuselage plug foam cutouts.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Putting together the main fuselage plug.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Putting together the main fuselage plug.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Sealing plug with fibre glass.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Sealing plug with fibre glass.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Body filling and sanding the plugs.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Body filling and sanding the plugs.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Looking good!
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Looking good!

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Spraying sanding primer onto the plugs.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Spraying sanding primer onto the plugs.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Primed plugs ready for more sanding.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Primed plugs ready for more sanding.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Primed main fuselage plug.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Primed main fuselage plug.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Main fuselage flange.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Main fuselage flange.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Primed aft plug w/ flanges.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Primed aft plug w/ flanges.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Final mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Final mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Waxing the plug.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Waxing the plug.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Wet layup in progress.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Wet layup in progress.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Vacuum sealing the plug.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Vacuum sealing the plug.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: One half of the main fuselage mould, outside, black gelcoat.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: One half of the main fuselage mould, outside, black gelcoat.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Final main fuselage mould cavity.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Final main fuselage mould cavity.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Fibres and core going into the mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Fibres and core going into the mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Mesh and infusion lines routing.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Mesh and infusion lines routing.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: PVA + Clear gelcoat on the mould.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: PVA + Clear gelcoat on the mould.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Main fuselage under vacuum.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Main fuselage under vacuum.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Saturated main fuselage.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Saturated main fuselage.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Main fuselage curing.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Main fuselage curing.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Demoulding party.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Demoulding party.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Top fuselage trimmed.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Top fuselage trimmed.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Hatch layup in progress.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Hatch layup in progress.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Fuselage marriage.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Fuselage marriage.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Filling the bottom fuselage.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Filling the bottom fuselage.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Fuselage going through paint.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: Fuselage going through paint.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Desktop router.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Desktop router.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Claire’s metal frame.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Center: Claire’s metal frame.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: CNC’d and formed hingers.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: CNC’d and formed hingers.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Claire back from competition, with battle scars.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Left: Claire back from competition, with battle scars.

image:image.image:title: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: The inside of Claire, as seen by the pilot.
image:image.image:caption: Submarine Gen III: Claire (2017-2019) — Right: The inside of Claire, as seen by the pilot.

image:image.image:title: Double (2023-2025) — Left: Our Product Hunt launch scoring 3rd place for the day.
image:image.image:caption: Double (2023-2025) — Left: Our Product Hunt launch scoring 3rd place for the day.

image:image.image:title: Double (2023-2025) — Center: Wesley, my co-founder pitching usedouble.com at the YC W23 demo day.
image:image.image:caption: Double (2023-2025) — Center: Wesley, my co-founder pitching usedouble.com at the YC W23 demo day.

image:image.image:title: Double (2023-2025) — Right: Final usedouble.com landing page.
image:image.image:caption: Double (2023-2025) — Right: Final usedouble.com landing page.

image:image.image:title: Drones (2018-2019) — Right: Winning an engineering analysis award.
image:image.image:caption: Drones (2018-2019) — Right: Winning an engineering analysis award.

image:image.image:title: Drones (2018-2019) — Left: MAVIS getting primer sprayed on.
image:image.image:caption: Drones (2018-2019) — Left: MAVIS getting primer sprayed on.

image:image.image:title: Drones (2018-2019) — Right: MAVIS on its final form.
image:image.image:caption: Drones (2018-2019) — Right: MAVIS on its final form.

image:image.image:title: Drones (2018-2019) — Left: MAVIS in its natural tether position.
image:image.image:caption: Drones (2018-2019) — Left: MAVIS in its natural tether position.

image:image.image:title: Drones (2018-2019) — Center: Take-off outside of ground effect.
image:image.image:caption: Drones (2018-2019) — Center: Take-off outside of ground effect.

image:image.image:title: Drones (2018-2019) — Right: MAVIS 2.0 on the tether, sans props.
image:image.image:caption: Drones (2018-2019) — Right: MAVIS 2.0 on the tether, sans props.

image:image.image:title: Drones (2018-2019) — Left: CNC’d a foam wing.
image:image.image:caption: Drones (2018-2019) — Left: CNC’d a foam wing.

image:image.image:title: Drones (2018-2019) — Left: Winning a $2.5k pitch competition.
image:image.image:caption: Drones (2018-2019) — Left: Winning a $2.5k pitch competition.

image:image.image:title: Drones (2018-2019) — Center: Winning a $5k pitch competition.
image:image.image:caption: Drones (2018-2019) — Center: Winning a $5k pitch competition.

image:image.image:title: Drones (2018-2019) — Left: Winning a $50k pitch competition.
image:image.image:caption: Drones (2018-2019) — Left: Winning a $50k pitch competition.
